<!-- GENERATED by scripts/generate_firmware_exercise_matrix.py — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
     Source of truth: validation/firmware_exercise.yaml. Regenerated and gated on every CI run. -->

# Firmware-exercise matrix

Machine-generated from `validation/firmware_exercise.yaml`. Where `VALIDATION_STATUS.md` asks *"is the model right vs silicon?"*, this matrix asks the complementary question: **does a real booting firmware actually RUN against the model?**

**The bar (strict):** a model is `proven` only when a booting firmware drives it end to end. A banner-only boot that never touches the peripheral, or a unit test that pokes its registers without running firmware, does **not** count.

Classes: **proven** (firmware drives it) · **unit-only** (register test, no firmware) · **dead** (modeled, never run) · **shim** (hardcoded stub masquerading as a model — the most misleading class).

Gate of the strongest proving firmware: 🟢 PR gate · 🟡 release CI · 🟠 on-demand · ⚪ ungated.

| Chip | Arch | Proven | Unit-only | Dead | Shim | Strongest gate |
|------|------|--------|-----------|------|------|----------------|
| `stm32l476` | cortex-m4f | 28 | 2 | 4 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `esp32c3` | riscv32imc | 8 | 5 | 2 | 2 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `esp32s3` | xtensa-lx7 | 10 | 23 | 1 | 1 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `esp32` | xtensa-lx6 | 7 | 7 | 0 | 1 | 🟡 release CI |
| `rp2040` | cortex-m0plus | 6 | 0 | 3 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `nrf52832` | cortex-m4f | 9 | 5 | 7 | 0 | 🟡 release CI |
| `nrf52840` | cortex-m4f | 6 | 20 | 8 | 2 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `mkw41z4` | cortex-m0plus | 4 | 0 | 16 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32h563` | cortex-m33 | 4 | 4 | 28 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32l073` | cortex-m0plus | 5 | 4 | 26 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32f407` | cortex-m4f | 4 | 1 | 25 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32f103` | cortex-m3 | 3 | 11 | 15 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32f401` | cortex-m4f | 3 | 1 | 25 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32g474re` | cortex-m4f | 3 | 0 | 32 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32wb55` | cortex-m4+m0plus | 4 | 0 | 31 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `stm32wba52` | cortex-m33 | 4 | 0 | 31 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `nrf5340` | cortex-m33 | 3 | 3 | 0 | 1 | 🟢 PR gate |
| `ci-fixture-riscv` | riscv32 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 🟢 PR gate |
| **total** | | **112** | **86** | **254** | **7** | |

> 112 peripheral models are driven by real firmware; 86 are register-tested only; 254 are modeled but never run; **7 are shims** (hardcoded stubs presenting as models).

## `stm32l476` — cortex-m4f

_Strongest ARM chip — 20+ peripherals driven by real firmware + IO-Link station (gated firmware test). Most cells are register-trace, not sensor reads._

**Proven by running firmware:**

| Peripheral | Firmware | Evidence | Gate |
|------------|----------|----------|------|
| RCC | `nucleo-l476rg-pll/cubemx-hal` | firmware_survival.rs:351 | 🟢 PR gate |

| PWR | `nucleo-l476rg-l4periphs` | firmware_survival.rs:406 | 🟢 PR gate |
| FLASH | `nucleo-l476rg-l4periphs` | firmware_survival.rs:406 | 🟢 PR gate |

**Dead** (4 modeled but never exercised): `GPDMA`, `FDCAN`, `HSEM`

## `esp32c3` — riscv32imc

_Only functional-sensor proof in the PR gate: real Sensirion/Melexis/Vishay drivers decode CO2/humidity/condensation over modeled I2C (Leo air-quality e2e)._

**Proven by running firmware:**

| Peripheral | Firmware | Evidence | Gate |
|------------|----------|----------|------|
| UART | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | tier1_matrix (release) | 🟡 release CI |
| GPIO | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | esp32c3/src/main.rs:114 | 🟡 release CI |
| I2C | `leo-airquality` | e2e_leo_airquality.rs:118 | 🟢 PR gate |
| SPI | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | esp32c3/src/main.rs:265 | 🟡 release CI |
| apb_saradc | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | esp32c3/src/main.rs:305 | 🟡 release CI |
| ledc | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | esp32c3/src/main.rs:366 | 🟡 release CI |
| intmatrix | `tier1-fixture/esp32c3` | esp32c3/src/main.rs:187 | 🟡 release CI |
| I2C sensor stack (SCD41/SGP41/SPS30/VEML7700/MLX90614) | `leo-airquality` | e2e_leo_airquality.rs:126-143 | 🟢 PR gate |

**Unit-only** (register test, no firmware drives it): `ana_i2c`, `forced_status`, `rtc_timer`, `sar_adc`, `sha`

**Dead** (2 modeled but never exercised): `cache`, `rng`

**Shims** (hardcoded stubs — not real fidelity):

- `virtual_wifi` (esp32c3/virtual_wifi.rs) — no real 802.11; unit-only stub
- `wifi_mac` (esp32c3/wifi_mac.rs) — MAC stub, not driven by firmware

## `esp32s3` — xtensa-lx7

_Broad model surface (~35), thin firmware: tier1 fixture + TMP102 read prove ~9; the rest are unit-only, several dead/broken._

**Proven by running firmware:**

| mcpwm | `tier1-fixture/esp32s3` | esp32s3/src/main.rs:344 | 🟡 release CI |

| UART | `tier1-fixture/esp32s3` | esp32s3/src/main.rs | 🟡 release CI |

**Unit-only** (register test, no firmware drives it): `aes`, `core1_control`, `crosscore_ipi`, `ds`, `extmem`, `flash_xip`, `gpspi`, `hmac`, `i2s`, `io_mux`, `ledc`, `lcd_cam`, `pcnt`, `rng`, `rsa`, `sar_adc`, `sdmmc`, `sens`, `sha`, `spi_mem_flash`, `system`, `twai`, `usb_otg`

**Dead** (1 modeled but never exercised): `gdma`

  > ⚠ gdma is WORSE than dead — the tier1 fixture FAILS it with code=gdma-no-m2m-model; it is listed as a model but has no working mem-to-mem path.

**Shims** (hardcoded stubs — not real fidelity):

- `wifi_thunks` (esp32s3/wifi_thunks.rs:8) — explicit thunk shortcutting the WiFi stack (hardcoded WL_CONNECTED + SimNet)

## `nrf5340` — cortex-m33

_Banner-only unmodified Zephyr: CLOCK/UARTE0/RTC1 drive the boot; nine peripheral blocks are benign stubs poked by SystemInit but never polled._

**Proven by running firmware:**

| Peripheral | Firmware | Evidence | Gate |
|------------|----------|----------|------|
| CLOCK | `nrf5340-zephyr` | nrf5340_clock_boot.rs | 🟢 PR gate |
| UARTE0 | `nrf5340-zephyr` | firmware_survival.rs:246 | 🟢 PR gate |
| RTC1 | `nrf5340-zephyr` | firmware_survival.rs:246 | 🟢 PR gate |

**Unit-only** (register test, no firmware drives it): `GPIO`, `TIMER0-2`, `RTC0`

**Shims** (hardcoded stubs — not real fidelity):

- `DCNF/FPU/CACHE/SPU/OSC_REG/CTRLAP/GPIOTE0/DPPIC/FICR` (nrf5340_*_stub) — poked by SystemInit, never polled — benign for UART boot only

## `ci-fixture-riscv` — riscv32

_Bare boot fixture: UART only ('RV OK')._

| Peripheral | Firmware | Evidence | Gate |
